title.gentle: Your Kamino loan needs some care
title.encouraging: Heads up on your Kamino loan

body.gentle: You have a loan on Kamino. Your margin is at {{margin}}% — the lower it gets, the closer to liquidation (automatic sell of your collateral). But it's fixable.
body.encouraging: Your Kamino loan has a {{margin}}% margin. Worth acting to stay safe. You've got this!
body.direct: Loan margin: {{margin}}%. HF: {{hf}}. Consider adding collateral.
body.technical: HF: {{hf}}. LTV rising. Margin: {{margin}}%. Liquidation projected if HF < 1.0.

body.gentle: {{symbol}} represents {{percent}}% of your portfolio. Diversifying helps protect your money if that asset drops.
body.encouraging: {{symbol}} makes up {{percent}}% of the total. Spreading across more assets is safer — and you already know how!
body.direct: {{symbol}} at {{percent}}% of portfolio. Consider rebalancing to reduce exposure.
body.technical: {{symbol}}: {{percent}}% of portfolio. Elevated concentration risk. Rebalancing recommended.

body.gentle: Only {{percent}}% of your portfolio is in stablecoins (stable currencies). Having some in stablecoins protects you when the market drops.
body.encouraging: You have {{percent}}% in stablecoins. Ideal is 10-30% — that way you have a reserve for opportunities!
body.direct: Stablecoins at {{percent}}% of portfolio. Ideal range: 10-30%.
body.technical: Stablecoin allocation: {{percent}}%. Target: 10-30% for volatility hedge.

title.gentle: You're just starting — and that's great!

body.gentle: Your portfolio has ${{total}}. Everyone starts somewhere. The important thing is to keep learning.
body.encouraging: You already have ${{total}} in your portfolio! Keep learning and building at your own pace.
body.direct: Current portfolio: ${{total}}. Track your progress here.

body.gentle: You have {{count}} different assets. That's good — it helps protect your money.
body.encouraging: {{count}} assets in your portfolio! Great diversification strategy. Keep it up!
body.direct: {{count}} assets in portfolio. Concentration within acceptable range.
